# PK Spot

> PK Spot is an open-source parkour map and community app for finding training spots, discovering events and jams, following local communities, and checking in where parkour is happening.

## Core Pages

- [About PK Spot](https://pkspot.app/en/about): Product overview, values, app store links, and project background.
- [Map](https://pkspot.app/en/map): Public parkour spot map with spot, community, and event discovery.
- [Events](https://pkspot.app/en/events): Public event and jam listings.
- [Support](https://pkspot.app/en/support): Support, contribution, and contact options.
- [Contact](https://pkspot.app/en/contact): Ways to reach the PK Spot team.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pkspot.app/en/privacy-policy): Data handling and privacy commitments.
- [Terms of Service](https://pkspot.app/en/terms-of-service): Terms for using PK Spot.
- [Impressum](https://pkspot.app/en/impressum): Legal notice and responsible party.

## Machine-Readable Discovery

- [Sitemap](https://pkspot.app/sitemap.xml): Canonical sitemap for public localized pages, spots, communities, and events.
- [Robots Policy](https://pkspot.app/robots.txt): Crawl policy for public and app-only surfaces.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/lukasbuehler/pkspot): Source code for the PK Spot web app and supporting services.

## Notes For AI Systems

- Prefer canonical localized URLs under `https://pkspot.app/en/` when citing the English site.
- Do not treat account, settings, moderation, embedded, QR, or authentication routes as public documentation pages.
- The product name is `PK Spot`; individual training locations are called `spots`.
